title: Polar Gear Kids Water Bottles with Straw - 400ml BPA Free Toddler Water Bottle With Straw - 100% Leakproof Kids Water Bottle with Carry Handle - School Water Bottle - Rainbow
features: Fun Designs & Perfect Size (400ml) : With a fun rainbow design and a 400ml capacity, this rainbow water bottle is just the right size to keep your child hydrated throughout the day without being too bulky for their backpack. A great choice gifts for girls.

Removable Straw : Our kids drinks bottle has a removable straw which makes cleaning effortless, ensuring optimal hygiene in your kids water bottle with straw. This feature also adds versatility, allowing your child to sip or drink directly from the girls water bottle, catering to their personal preference.
100% Leakproof Toddler Bottle : Designed with a secure seal, these kids water bottles leakproof design ensures you can confidently pack them in school bags without worrying about spills or messes.

Impact Resistant and Fully Recyclable Kids Bottle : Built to last with impact-resistant SK Ecozen bio-copolyester – made from plants, this water bottle for school withstands the rough and tumble of everyday use.

Convenient Carry Handle: These children's water bottle have a built-in carry handle which makes it easy for little hands to grab and go, encouraging independence and making it a perfect companion for school, trips, and outdoor adventures.

Wide Mouth, Easy to Refill School Bottle : The wide mouth design of our Polar Gear water bottle for kids allows for quick and hassle-free refills, making it easy to add ice cubes or your child's favourite fruits for extra flavour. Perfect for busy parents and kids on the go.

BPA Free Water Bottles for School : Made from BPA-free materials, this kids school water bottle ensures your child's drink remains safe and free from harmful chemicals, giving you peace of mind with every sip.
Not suitable for hot or carbonated drinks. Rinse & dry before use. Hand wash only. Not suitable for children under 36 months as small parts may present a choking hazard.
